category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dasel as a JSON, YAML, TOML, XML, and CSV query and modification tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dasel; source_facts.repo is the official TomWright/dasel repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists supported data formats and query/modification functionality; source_facts.executables lists dasel.
